final:
module my_module (
    input a,
    input b,
    input c,
    input d,
    input e,
    output f
);

    assign f = (a + b + c + d + e) >= 3 ? 1 : 0;

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      f <= ~((a & b) | (a & c) | (a & d) | (a & e) | (b & c) | (b & d) | (b & e) | (c & d) | (c & e) | (d & e));
    end
  end

endmodule
